Bash("/c/Program Files/MATLAB/R2023a/bin/matlab" -nosplash -nodesktop -batch "addpath\(genpath\('e:/bwzheng/DDM_Maxwell/DDM-FEM-Helmholtz-Maxwell'\)\); [node, elem] = linemesh\(0,1,4\); A2 = assembleStiffness1D\(node, elem, 2\); disp\('P2 stiffness \(1:3,1:3\):'\); disp\(full\(A2\(1:3,1:3\)\)\); h=0.25; expected=\(1/h\)*[7/3,-8/3,1/3;-8/3,16/3,-8/3;1/3,-8/3,7/3]; disp\('Expected:'\); disp\(expected\); disp\('Difference:'\); disp\(full\(A2\(1:3,1:3\)\)-expected\);")

Bash("/c/Program Files/MATLAB/R2023a/bin/matlab" -nosplash -nodesktop -batch "addpath\(genpath\('e:/bwzheng/DDM_Maxwell/DDM-FEM-Helmholtz-Maxwell'\)\); [x,w]=gauss1D\(4\); disp\('x:'\); disp\(x\); disp\('w:'\); disp\(w\); disp\('sum\(w\):'\); disp\(sum\(w\)\); [phi,Dphi]=lagrange1D\(2,x\); disp\('Dphi:'\); disp\(Dphi\); Kref = zeros\(3\); for q=1:4, Kref = Kref + w\(q\) * \(Dphi\(q,:\)' * Dphi\(q,:\)\); end; disp\('Kref via quad:'\); disp\(Kref\); disp\('Expected Kref:'\); disp\([7/3 -8/3 1/3; -8/3 16/3 -8/3; 1/3 -8/3 7/3]\);")
